# Outdoor Adventures BC

> Kelowna, BC fishing charter and sightseeing tour company. Private captained trips on Okanagan, Shuswap and Arrow Lakes aboard a 26-foot Kingfisher 2525 Weekender. 5.0 stars on Google.

## Core facts

- Business: Outdoor Adventures BC
- Service: Guided fishing charters and sightseeing tours
- Base: Kelowna, British Columbia, Canada
- Phone: +1-250-902-8323
- Email: info@outdooradventuresbc.ca
- Hours: 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM, 7 days a week
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/outdooradventure.bc
- Google reviews: https://share.google/oQfowrUI3wFXEOYxG
- Owner: Dennis Barnes (LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dennis-barnes-8b9061115/ · Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dennis.barnes.5817/)
- Stay+Fish Airbnb (hosted by Dennis): https://www.airbnb.ca/rooms/1546682788737611961

## Pricing

- Hourly: $200 CAD per hour
- Half-day (4 hours): $800 CAD
- Full-day (8 hours): $1,600 CAD
- Sunset cruise (2 hours): $400 CAD
- Capacity: up to 6 guests per charter
- Boat: Kingfisher 2525 Weekender (25'11", aluminum, heated cabin, full head, fridge)

## Service area

Okanagan Lake (primary), Shuswap Lake, Kalamalka Lake, Mabel Lake, Upper Arrow Lake, Lower Arrow Lake, Kinbasket Lake. Serving Kelowna, West Kelowna, Vernon, Peachland, Penticton.

## Target species by lake

- Okanagan Lake (Kelowna): kokanee salmon
- Shuswap Lake: chinook salmon (summer), burbot (winter)
- Arrow Lakes / Kalamalka / Mabel: custom multi-day adventures and sightseeing cruises

- [Home](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/): Kelowna fishing charters overview

- [Pricing](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/pricing.html): Transparent pricing table
- [Half-day charter](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/charters/half-day-charter.html): 4-hour trip details
- [Full-day charter](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/charters/full-day-charter.html): 8-hour trip details
- [Sunset cruise](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/charters/sunset-cruise.html): 2-hour private cruise
- [Corporate charter](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/charters/corporate-charter.html): Business entertaining
- [Family fishing trip](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/charters/family-fishing-trip.html): Kid-friendly trips
- [Sightseeing tours](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/sightseeing-tours.html): Boat tours & cruises
- [Our boat](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/our-boat.html): Kingfisher 2525 specifications

- [Reviews](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/reviews.html)
- [FAQ](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/faq.html)
- [Contact / booking](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/contact.html)

## Booking info

- Deposit: 50% to hold your date
- Balance: Due day of trip
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before departure
- Weather cancellation: Free reschedule any time
- BC fishing licence: Required for anglers 16+; buy online in minutes
- Kids under 16 fish free
